TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Calvin Booth sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1976, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 5, Calvin Booth, squliq na p'unro. qyanux na hopa pqwasan biru Booth mqbaq biru beh Penn State hopa pqwasan biru. 1998 kawas maki Bachelor of Arts wal magal hopa na pqwasan biru. 2012-2013 kawas pspung na mzyu mari lga,t'aring praw gleng 峰 bincyogun nya. qutux kawas lga,hiya ga musa Minnesota kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players 0
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨal*in βootħ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨal*in βootħ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qjanux na ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru βootħ mqβaq βiru βeħ penn s~ɕtate ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ maki βaʦ~ʨħelor o* arts~ɕ wal maɣal ħopa na pqwas~ɕan βiru. ****-**** kawas~ɕ ps~ɕpuŋ na mzju mari lɣa,tʔariŋ praw ɣleŋ * βinʦ~ʨjoɣun nja. qutux kawas~ɕ lɣa,ħija ɣa mus~ɕa minnes~ɕota kinβlajqan pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan s~ɕa qnxan nijaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ *
S.FORM: Calvin Booth sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1976, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 5, Calvin Booth, squliq na p'unro. qyanux na hopa pqwasan biru Booth mqbaq biru beh Penn State hopa pqwasan biru. 1998 kawas maki Bachelor of Arts wal magal hopa na pqwasan biru. 2012-2013 kawas pspung na mzyu mari lga,t'aring praw gleng 峰 bincyogun nya. qutux kawas lga,hiya ga musa Minnesota kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players 0
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨal*in βootħ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨal*in βootħ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qjanux na ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru βootħ mqβaq βiru βeħ penn s~ɕtate ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ maki βaʦ~ʨħelor o* arts~ɕ wal maɣal ħopa na pqwas~ɕan βiru. ****-**** kawas~ɕ ps~ɕpuŋ na mzju mari lɣa,tʔariŋ praw ɣleŋ * βinʦ~ʨjoɣun nja. qutux kawas~ɕ lɣa,ħija ɣa mus~ɕa minnes~ɕota kinβlajqan pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan s~ɕa qnxan nijaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ *
